title: DELIVERY_REJECTION
description: Rejection response of the baseline HTTP transport binding (docs/TRANSPORT-BINDING.md) — not an RFC-0001 Section 6 protocol message. Returned with an HTTP 4xx status when a receiver definitively rejects a protocol message. A rejection is a delivery outcome, not a delivery failure: the sender must not blindly retry the identical message (a corrected message is a new message). signature is RECOMMENDED — a signed rejection strengthens the sender's delivery attempt record (STD-030).

received_at.description: Receiver's clock at the time of rejection.

receiver_id.description: (Optional) Terminal ID of the rejecting receiver.

signature.description: (Optional, RECOMMENDED) Ed25519 signature over the canonical body excluding this field.
